ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Wheat flour (47%), sugar (28%), palm oil (10%), cocoa, invert sugar, glucose, com starch, raising agents (ammonium bicarbonate E503, sodium bicarbonate E500), malt extract, iodized salt, flavors, protease, antioxidants (soy lecithin E322, sodium metabisulphite E223). Content cream 25%. Contains gluten.
